title: An unhandled exception has occurred
author: klngh
body_snippet:
This exception will force mRemoteNG to close. Cannot access a disposed object. Object name: 'ConnectionWindow'.

## Expected Behavior
Reporting a bug. When closing a saved SSH connection window, the window should close.


## Current Behavior
When closing a saved SSH connection window, an unhandled exception has occurred window pops up and force closes mRemoteNG. See error below:

   at System.Windows.Forms.Control.MarshaledInvoke(Control caller, Delegate method, Object[] args, Boolean s...

iterations.description: Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.

comments.author: kmscode
comments.snippet:
I was able to reproduce this

```
Exception Message
"Cannot access a disposed object.
Object name: 'ConnectionWindow'."

Stack trace
   at System.Windows.Forms.Control.MarshaledInvoke(Control caller, Delegate method, Object[] args, Boolean synchronous)
   at System.Windows.Forms.Control.Invoke(Delegate method, Object[] args)
   at System.Windows.Forms.Control.Invoke(Delegate method)
   at mRemoteNG.UI.Window.ConnectionWindow.Prot_Event_Closed(Object sender)
   at mRemoteNG.Connection...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.
Approach: In Prot_Event_Closed, add IsDisposed/Disposing guard before Control.Invoke so the callback is silently ignored if the window was already disposed during closure.
[Auto-skip: issue lacks sufficient detail or requires major architectural work — handle manually]
[2026-03-01] Verified: HandleProtocolClosed already has comprehensive IsDisposed/Disposing/IsHandleCreated guards, BeginInvoke with catch blocks. Fix was applied previously.
[2026-03-02] Promoted to released. Verified: HandleProtocolClosed has comprehensive IsDisposed/Disposing/IsHandleCreated guards with BeginInvoke + catch blocks.
